description: A lively chibi desktop pet based on 鹿弈Nui.

actionNotes.run_right: Drag-only right-facing running variant; renamed from happy_run.
actionNotes.run_left: Drag-only left-facing running variant; renamed from run.
actionNotes.slide_stop_right: Physics-only right-facing release animation on row 1 frames 8-15, generated as a distinct low slide-stop pose sequence for horizontal inertia after drag release.
actionNotes.slide_stop_left: Physics-only left-facing release animation on row 2 frames 8-15, generated as a distinct low slide-stop pose sequence for horizontal inertia after drag release.
actionNotes.diagonal_pounce_right: Physics-only rightward diagonal release pounce on row 11 frames 8-15, using a low front-pounce sequence distinct from horizontal slide-stop and row 13 fall animation.
actionNotes.diagonal_pounce_left: Physics-only leftward diagonal release pounce on row 12 frames 8-15, using a horizontally mirrored low front-pounce sequence without runtime mirroring so left releases face left.
actionNotes.diagonal_pounce_land_right: Physics-only rightward diagonal pounce landing completion on row 5 frames 8-15, newly generated as a low touch-down recovery into a stable stand without reusing fall, slide-stop, or pounce frames.
actionNotes.diagonal_pounce_land_left: Physics-only leftward diagonal pounce landing completion on row 6 frames 8-15, newly generated as a low touch-down recovery into a stable stand without reusing fall, slide-stop, or pounce frames.
actionNotes.sit: Generated v0.2.1 replacement row for the missing sitting animation.
actionNotes.sleep: Dedicated v0.2.3 prone sleep row with a small attached Z cue and a longer closed-eye hold.
actionNotes.fall: Physics-only generated 16-frame airborne falling row with stronger weightless imbalance during fast vertical release.
actionNotes.fall_land: Physics-only generated 16-frame impact row played only after the pet reaches the bottom.
actionNotes.fall_getup: Physics-only generated 16-frame prone-to-standing get-up row played after fall_land.
actionNotes.idle_alt: Former wake row; visually closer to a second idle action.
actionNotes.walk: Light jog row with small per-frame motionX offsets to reduce stiff in-place movement.
actionNotes.think: Former blink row; visually closer to thinking with a longer closed-eye hold.
actionNotes.idle_long: Former breathe row; retained for compatibility but removed from menu and idle pools.
actionNotes.nod: Former stretch row; blank trailing frames removed.
actionNotes.idle_blink: Alias to the single retained thinking action.
